title: BHRRC: an expanding resource for corporate accountability
impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Topsoil degradation and loss of soil fertility -> "Vedanta Resources Plc has, since 2015, legally battled accusations of contaminating land and affecting livelihoods of communities near its Nchanga copper mine in Zambia." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation -> "Vedanta Resources Plc has, since 2015, legally battled accusations of contaminating land and affecting livelihoods of communities near its Nchanga copper mine in Zambia." || Governance | Transparency & Accountability | Accountability for accidents and environmental damage -> "last October a court of appeal in UK, where Vedanta is headquartered, permitted the claims of victims to be heard in the UK, citing "duty of care" that extended up the line from the subsidiary—Konkola Copper Mines—to parent." | ""The ruling represents a breakthrough in 'piercing the corporate veil,'" the Centre commented pithily, "which is widely recognized to be a key obstacle to accessing remedy" by victims, in this case 1,826 Zambian villagers."

title: Kagem emerald receives world's first laser inscription
impact_evidence: Governance | Transparency & Accountability | Corporate transparency and reporting -> "Mining company Gemfields said on Friday it had successfully laser-inscribed an emerald from its Kagem mine in the Zambian town of Lufwanyama with microscopic traceability information and a personalised message, the first such achievement in the world." | "Last year, it unveiled a 'paternity testing' mechanism with jewellery firm Gübelin, whereby un-cut gemstones could be tagged with specially encoded nano-particles which would survive cutting, polishing and treatment processes, allowing the mine-of-origin of the gemstone to be determined years or decades later."
